description: Get Jeremy's full structured resume as JSON.

description.name: get_availability
description.description: Get Jeremy's booking URL and availability information.

description.name: send_message
description.description: Send a message to Jeremy by email. Requires agent_name (your identifier) and human_name (the person you represent). Rate limited to 3 action requests per IP per day.

description.name: book_call
description.description: Get a pre-filled Calendly booking link for a call with Jeremy. Requires agent_name and human_name. Rate limited to 3 action requests per IP per day.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_availability · Public sink: send_message.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_availability · Public sink: send_message

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
